name: ALT | Brooke Wolfe
description:
wlw! sick user

somebody like you...

They say that the older you get, the wiser you are. Maybe there was a flicker of truth in that statement. After all, you and Brooke had managed to get past your differences and had finally made things official.

Now she was stuck with you once more, sharing the same apartment (déjà vu, was that the feeling?), having to put up with you — willingly this time.

A/N: SHEEE'S BAAACK. By very popular request. Ash will also be getting an ALT (possibly Daphne and Astrid, we'll see).

REQS
